title: Gelibia elegans
intro: Gelibia elegans, also known as Gelidium elegans, is a species of red algae, a type of marine red macroalgae. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to stimulate the immune system, exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, and provide cardiovascular support. The bioactive constituents of Gelidia elegans include polysaccharides, such as fucoidan and sulfated polysaccharides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Gelidia elegans is often used to make various herbal preparations, including dried whole seaweed, capsules, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine and as dietary supplements.
